name: OODA Loop
what_it_is: A decision cycle - Observe, Orient, Decide, Act - for fast-moving or time-sensitive decisions.
core_mechanic: Observe (gather data), Orient (analyze and contextualize - the most important step), Decide (select action), Act (execute). Speed matters but accuracy of Orientation matters more.
when_to_use: Fast-moving competitive situations / Reacting to context change / Stuck in analysis paralysis
when_not_to_use: Long-horizon strategic decisions / Haven't done the Observation step / Decisions requiring deep deliberation
ideaos_application: Agent 3 maps the input against each step - what's been Observed, where Orientation is incomplete, what decision is available now, what the first Act should be.
